task_objective: Precise Press-on Nail Mapping and Multi-Angle Wear Showcase - Perfectly map Image 2 nails onto Image 1 hand with precise consistency

target_hand_reference.focus: Fingernail positions, exact perspective, natural curvature, hand anatomy, lighting conditions, and background environment
target_hand_reference.role: Provide precise target hand structure for nail mapping and wear effect

source_nail_reference.focus: First row of press-on nails - EXACT preservation of design details, color gradients, artistic elements, pattern integrity, texture depth, shine reflections, and material properties
source_nail_reference.role: Provide source nail designs to be perfectly mapped and maintained with zero deviation

workflow.role: Master Nail Artist & Precision Digital Mapping Specialist

steps.step_1_hand_analysis: Comprehensive analysis of Image 1: precise fingernail positions, natural curvature, perspective angles, hand anatomy, lighting direction, and shadow patterns.
steps.step_2_nail_extraction: Perfect extraction of the first row of press-on nails from Image 2 - capture every detail with pixel-perfect precision: design elements, color transitions, textures, shine, and material characteristics.
steps.step_3_precision_mapping: Precision mapping: apply extracted nails onto Image 1's fingernails with perfect alignment, follow natural curvature and perspective, realistic lighting integration, and seamless edge blending - NO design distortion or loss of detail.
steps.step_4_multi_angle_generation: Generate four distinct wear views while maintaining absolute nail design consistency across all angles.

final_execution:
Generate a four-panel grid layout showcasing the perfectly mapped press-on nails from four distinct angles:
1. Original Hand Gesture: Strictly maintain Image 1's hand gesture, showing precise mapping with realistic lighting and seamless edge blending.
2. Back of Hand View (Dorsal Perspective): Natural back of hand view with perfectly mapped nails maintaining full design consistency.
3. Fist Clench View: Natural clenched fist angle showing the mapped nails from this practical wear perspective.
4. Finger Pinch View: Fingertips pinching together, showcasing the nails from this detailed close-up angle.
CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:
- Absolute consistency of nail design, colors, patterns, and artistic elements across ALL FOUR views
- No loss of detail, no design distortion, no color shift in any view
- Perfect alignment with natural finger curvature and perspective in each view
- Realistic lighting and shadow integration matching each specific angle
- Seamless edge blending between nails and fingers in all views
